title: eleogiton filiformis
side_effects: Eleogiton filiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including diarrhea, nausea, and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation and respiratory issues. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can also cause liver damage and kidney problems. Some individuals may also experience headaches, dizziness, and fatigue when using eleogiton filiformis without proper guidance. Additionally, the plant can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, which can lead to adverse health consequences.
